requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — UNIT Conformity and Uruguay PV Project Review
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全证据——UNIT合格评定与乌拉圭光伏项目审查
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全證據——UNIT合格評定與烏拉圭光伏項目審查

summary.en: Uruguay PV inverter safety documentation should be built around UNIT-recognised conformity evidence and IEC safety standards used for photovoltaic power conversion equipment. IEC 62109-1 covers general safety requirements for PV power converters, while IEC 62109-2 covers inverter-specific requirements. Because grid-tied inverters interact with UTE's distribution network and user premises, project files should include model-specific IEC 62109-1/-2 certificates or type-test reports from an accepted laboratory, together with installation manuals, ratings, markings, and any UNIT or project-owner conformity documentation requested for Uruguay.
summary.zh: 乌拉圭光伏逆变器安全文件应围绕UNIT认可的合格评定证据和光伏功率变换设备适用的IEC安全标准建立。IEC 62109-1涵盖光伏功率变换器通用安全要求，IEC 62109-2涵盖逆变器特殊要求。由于并网逆变器与UTE配电网和用户场所相互作用，项目文件应包括获接受实验室出具的特定型号IEC 62109-1/-2证书或型式试验报告，以及安装手册、额定参数、标识和乌拉圭所需的任何UNIT或项目业主合格评定文件。
summary.zht: 烏拉圭光伏逆變器安全文件應圍繞UNIT認可的合格評定證據和光伏功率轉換設備適用的IEC安全標準建立。IEC 62109-1涵蓋光伏功率轉換器通用安全要求，IEC 62109-2涵蓋逆變器特殊要求。由於併網逆變器與UTE配電網和用戶場所相互作用，項目文件應包括獲接受實驗室出具的特定型號IEC 62109-1/-2證書或型式試驗報告，以及安裝手冊、額定參數、標識和烏拉圭所需的任何UNIT或項目業主合格評定文件。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
UNIT standards and conformity-assessment framework for Uruguay

summary.en: China-side safety evidence commonly includes GB/T 37408 test reports and voluntary CQC/CGC documentation for PV grid-connected inverters. GB/T 37408 covers safety, electrical performance, EMC, and marking topics under China's domestic framework, but it is not automatically treated as IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence for Uruguay. A China certificate is best treated as supporting documentation that must be mapped to the exact IEC clauses and accepted by the Uruguay conformity or project review path.
summary.zh: 中国侧安全证据通常包括GB/T 37408测试报告以及光伏并网逆变器CQC/CGC自愿性文件。GB/T 37408在中国国内框架下覆盖安全、电气性能、EMC和标识等项目，但不会自动被视为乌拉圭IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据。中国证书宜作为支持文件，须映射至具体IEC条款，并由乌拉圭合格评定或项目审查路径接受。
summary.zht: 中國側安全證據通常包括GB/T 37408測試報告以及光伏併網逆變器CQC/CGC自願性文件。GB/T 37408在中國國內框架下覆蓋安全、電氣性能、EMC和標識等項目，但不會自動被視為烏拉圭IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據。中國證書宜作為支持文件，須映射至具體IEC條款，並由烏拉圭合格評定或項目審查路徑接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T 37408 safety documentation does not by itself satisfy Uruguay IEC-based safety expectations. Exporters should obtain IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates or reports for the supplied model or model family, confirm that ratings and firmware match the Uruguay configuration, and prepare Spanish or locally acceptable technical documentation if requested by the importer, installer, UNIT conformity body, or UTE project reviewer.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T 37408安全文件本身不能满足乌拉圭基于IEC的安全预期。出口商应为所供应型号或型号系列取得IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书或报告，确认额定参数和固件与乌拉圭配置一致，并在进口商、安装商、UNIT合格评定机构或UTE项目审查方要求时准备西班牙语或当地可接受的技术文件。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T 37408安全文件本身不能滿足烏拉圭基於IEC的安全預期。出口商應為所供應型號或型號系列取得IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書或報告，確認額定參數和韌體與烏拉圭配置一致，並在進口商、安裝商、UNIT合格評定機構或UTE項目審查方要求時準備西班牙語或當地可接受的技術文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where required by UNIT conformity assessment, UTE project review, procurement specifications, or installer due diligence for Uruguay grid-tied PV projects
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408-based PV inverter certification is China domestic evidence and does not transfer automatically

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A China GB/T 37408 safety file should not be submitted as a substitute for IEC 62109-1/-2 evidence in Uruguay. Build the Uruguay package around model-specific IEC 62109-1/-2 certificates or type-test reports, UNIT conformity expectations, and UTE project review requirements before committing equipment to shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 37408安全文件不应作为乌拉圭IEC 62109-1/-2证据的替代品提交。请围绕特定型号IEC 62109-1/-2证书或型式试验报告、UNIT合格评定预期和UTE项目审查要求建立乌拉圭文件包，再承诺设备出货。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 37408安全文件不應作為烏拉圭IEC 62109-1/-2證據的替代品提交。請圍繞特定型號IEC 62109-1/-2證書或型式試驗報告、UNIT合格評定預期和UTE項目審查要求建立烏拉圭文件包，再承諾設備出貨。
